title: Indulgent Russian Morcilla Dumplings
description: Smoky, tender dumplings featuring morcilla wrapped in a light pastry, no onion or garlic for a clean, indulgent flavor.
instructions: Slice morcilla into 1 cm thick rounds and set aside.
In a bowl mix flour, smoked paprika, liquid smoke, salt, pepper, and dill (if using).
Add water gradually until dough forms a firm but pliable consistency.
Divide dough into 12 equal portions, roll each into a 6 cm circle.
Place a slice of morcilla in the center of each dough circle.
Fold dough over the filling and pinch edges to seal.
Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil; cook dumplings until they float and are al dente, about 8 minutes.
Drain dumplings and pat dry with paper towels.
In a skillet, melt butter and add olive oil; heat until shimmering.
Fry dumplings for 3-4 minutes on each side until golden brown and crisp.
Serve hot topped with a drizzle of melted butter and a sprinkle of fresh dill.
